title: heterotheca sessiliflora var. camphorata
intro: Heterotheca sessiliflora var. camphorata, also known as Camphor Fleabane or Camphorweed, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Heterotheca sessiliflora var. camphorata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments.
